productDisplayName: Puma Women Corsica Mid L Shine Grey Shoe
description: Whether you're on domestic soil or abroad, the women's Corsica from puma will keep you looking fashionably Fit and stylish!Upper Durable synthetic leather upper Lace-up front with metallic eyelets and tonal rivet tab Canvas lining with cushioned footbed for added comfort Midsole Low-profile rubber midsole with pronounced toe guard and heel for maximum comfort Outsole Gum-rubber outsole for maximum durability and traction puma block-lettering tread pattern for absolute grip and support
